mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `screen_rental_order_log` ( order_id, operation_type, operation_result, operator_id, operator_name, operator_phone, display_type, operation_remark, file_url, operation_time ) VALUES ( #{data.orderId}, #{data.operationType}, #{data.operationResult}, #{data.operatorId}, #{data.operatorName}, #{data.operatorPhone}, #{data.displayType}, #{data.operationRemark}, #{data.fileUrl}, #{data.operationTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `screen_rental_order_log` WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY operation_time DESC, id DESC
